title: Your Netflix bill is up 29% in just over a year. It’s time for Washington to step in.
summary: Netflix price increases have jumped 29% in just over a year amid Wall Street favoring the stock, now drawing regulatory attention from policymakers. The article examines whether government intervention is needed to address streaming service pricing.
content: Netflix is still a Wall Street favorite — and a target for government regulators

zh.title: 你的Netflix账单一年多来上涨了29%。该是华盛顿介入的时候了。
zh.summary: Netflix价格在一年多的时间里上涨了29%，在华尔街支持该股票的背景下，引起了政策制定者的监管关注。该文章探讨了政府干预是否有必要来解决流媒体服务定价问题。

title: These are the obstacles still keeping women from retirement security
summary: Women continue to face systemic barriers to achieving retirement security, highlighting the need for targeted policy solutions. The article discusses why dedicated focus on women's retirement challenges remains essential.
content: Yes, women still need a “retirement security day.” Here’s why.

zh.title: 这些是仍然阻碍女性实现退休保障的障碍
zh.summary: 女性继续面临系统性障碍，无法实现退休安全，这突出了有针对性的政策解决方案的必要性。该文章讨论了为什么对女性退休挑战的专注仍然至关重要。

title: My relative inherited money in her 80s. Will it affect her Social Security taxes or Medicare premiums?
summary: An inheritance received in one's 80s may have tax implications but typically doesn't directly impact Social Security benefits or Medicare premiums. The article addresses a common concern about how sudden windfall income affects senior entitlements.
content: “She lives a modest lifestyle.”

zh.title: 我的亲戚在80多岁时继承了一笔钱。这会影响她的社会保障税或医疗保险费吗？
zh.summary: 在80多岁时获得的继承可能涉及税收影响，但通常不会直接影响社会保障福利或医疗保险费。该文章解决了一个普遍关注的问题，即突然获得的意外收入如何影响老年人的权利。

title: You are missing the bond deal of the decade — and it is guaranteed to beat inflation
summary: TIPS (Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities) are currently offering historically attractive yields that exceed inflation rates. The article encourages investors to lock in these favorable terms while available.
content: TIPS are offering a rare gift — and it is time to lock in a generous payout.

zh.title: 你错过了十年一遇的债券交易——它保证能跑赢通胀
zh.summary: TIPS（国债通胀保护证券）目前提供历史性的吸引力收益率，超过通胀率。这篇文章鼓励投资者趁这些有利条款可用时锁定这些收益。

title: The AI rotation stole the spotlight from a strong start to earnings season
summary: AI stocks dominated market attention during the second quarter earnings season, overshadowing solid earnings results from other sectors. The AI trade continued its market leadership despite a broader strong earnings performance.
content: The AI trade dominated the market once again this week, upstaging an impressive start to the second-quarter earnings season.

zh.title: AI轮动从火热的财报季开局中抢走了聚光灯
zh.summary: 在第二季度财报季期间，AI股票主导了市场关注，掩盖了其他行业的良好业绩。尽管整体业绩表现强劲，AI交易仍继续其市场领导地位。

title: Fanatics CEO Michael Rubin on two sports businesses his multibillion-dollar conglomerate won't enter
summary: Fanatics CEO Michael Rubin outlined two sports business sectors his conglomerate will avoid as it expands its merchandise, collectibles, and sports gambling platforms. The statement reveals strategic boundaries for one of sports' most influential companies.
content: Fanatics has become one of the most influential companies in sports, building out a massive merchandise, collectibles and sports gambling platform.

zh.title: Fanatics首席执行官Michael Rubin谈其数十亿美元集团不会进入的两个体育业务
zh.summary: Fanatics首席执行官Michael Rubin概述了他的集团在扩展其商品、收藏品和体育博彩平台时将避免的两个体育业务部门。该声明揭示了体育界最具影响力的公司之一的战略边界。

title: Two unexpected revelations in Warren Buffett's CNBC interview
summary: Warren Buffett clarified that Bill Gates' association with Jeffrey Epstein was not the reason he ceased donations to Gates' initiatives. The interview revealed surprising details about the philanthropic partnership's dissolution.
content: Warren Buffett tells CNBC that Bill Gates' ties to Jeffrey Epstein didn't drive his termination of donations.

zh.title: 沃伦·巴菲特CNBC采访中的两个意外启示
zh.summary: 沃伦·巴菲特澄清，比尔·盖茨与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的关联并非他停止向盖茨倡议捐赠的原因。该采访揭示了这一慈善伙伴关系解除的惊人细节。

title: Why Dana White thinks much more of UFC's future will be Power Slap and boxing
summary: UFC President Dana White predicts that Power Slap may eventually rival the UFC as a major fighting sport, alongside expanded boxing offerings. The prediction signals the organization's strategic pivot toward diverse fighting formats.
content: UFC president and CEO Dana White predicted that Power Slap may become as big as his flagship fighting sport at the Game Plan conference in New York.

zh.title: 达纳·怀特为什么认为UFC的未来将更多涉及Power Slap和拳击
zh.summary: UFC总裁达纳·怀特预测，Power Slap可能最终会与UFC一样成为主要的格斗运动，同时扩展拳击项目。这一预测表明该组织正在战略性地转向多样化的格斗形式。

title: Trump Media pitched $100,000 monthly fee for fastest feed of U.S. president's posts, sources say
summary: Trump Media & Technology Group has proposed a premium subscription tier charging $100,000 monthly for expedited access to the president's social media posts. The company also offers a discounted $60,000 monthly option for three-year commitments.
content: Trump Media & ⁠Technology Group has in recent weeks also pitched a discounted plan of $60,000 per month if the firms sign up for a three-year plan.

zh.title: 消息人士称Trump Media为最快获取美国总统发布内容的服务提议月费10万美元
zh.summary: Trump Media & Technology Group提议推出高级订阅层，每月收费10万美元以加快获取总统社交媒体发布内容。该公司还为三年承诺提供每月6万美元的折扣选项。

title: Scam victims can owe taxes on stolen money. A bill in Congress could offer relief
summary: A proposed House bill would restore pre-2018 tax deductions for theft losses and provide relief for fraud victims who face tax liability on stolen funds. The legislation addresses a counterintuitive tax burden affecting crime victims.
content: A bill in the House would restore a pre-2018 rule that generally allowed a tax deduction for theft losses and would add other relief for fraud victims.

zh.title: 诈骗受害者可能需要为被盗金钱缴税。国会的一项法案可能会提供救济
zh.summary: 一项提议的众议院法案将恢复2018年之前的盗窃损失税收减免，并为面临盗窃资金税务责任的欺诈受害者提供救济。该立法解决了影响犯罪受害者的矛盾税收负担。

title: A massive lettuce recall hits home as local restaurants shake up their salad menus
summary: A widespread lettuce recall is forcing independent restaurants to dispose of bagged lettuce and adjust their salad offerings. Some establishments are finding alternative ways to continue serving leafy greens to customers.
content: Some independent restaurants are throwing out all their bagged lettuce, while others have found ways to keep serving customers their leafy greens.

zh.title: 大规模生菜召回迫使当地餐厅调整沙拉菜单
zh.summary: 广泛的生菜召回迫使独立餐厅处理袋装生菜并调整沙拉供应。一些机构正在寻找替代方式继续为顾客提供叶菜类蔬菜。

title: 27-year-old locksmith spent $7,000 on tools, works around the clock in NYC: 'I'd never held a screwdriver in my life' before starting
summary: Yona Sahar, founder of Locksmith Girl of NYC, invested $7,000 and two years of training to launch her locksmith business despite no prior tool experience. She now runs a thriving independent operation while working demanding hours.
content: Yona Sahar, founder of Locksmith Girl of NYC, spent two years learning the trade. Now, she runs her own business while working around the clock.

zh.title: 27岁开锁匠在纽约花费7000美元购买工具，夜以继日地工作："开始前我从未拿过螺丝刀"
zh.summary: Locksmith Girl of NYC创始人Yona Sahar投入7000美元和两年的培训来创办开锁业务，尽管之前没有使用工具的经验。她现在经营着一家繁荣的独立企业，同时工作时间很长。

title: I left the U.S. for Trinidad and Tobago: My family of 4 spends about $3,000 a month—and we've never been happier
summary: Chantel Henry relocated her family of four to Trinidad and Tobago where their monthly expenses total approximately $3,000, achieving an affordable version of the American Dream. The move has improved their quality of life and financial stability.
content: Chantel Henry lives with her husband and two kids in Trinidad. She says living there has made her American Dream more affordable.

zh.title: 我离开美国前往特立尼达和多巴哥：我的4口之家每月花费约3000美元——我们从未如此幸福过
zh.summary: Chantel Henry将她的四口之家搬迁到特立尼达和多巴哥，那里他们的月度支出总计约3000美元，实现了美国梦的经济版本。这次搬迁改善了他们的生活质量和财务稳定性。

title: Your Social Security check could go up by $74 a month next year
summary: Social Security beneficiaries may receive an increase of $74 per month in 2027 based on a projected 3.8% cost-of-living adjustment. The adjustment reflects cooling inflation trends.
content: Social Security’s cost-of-living-adjustment could be 3.8% in 2027, as inflation shows signs of cooling.

zh.title: 你的社会保障支票明年可能每月增加74美元
zh.summary: 社会保障受益人可能在2027年基于预计3.8%的生活成本调整每月增加74美元。这一调整反映了通胀降温的趋势。

title: World Cup audience stayed bipartisan despite Trump's prominent role, CNBC survey finds
summary: A CNBC survey found that nearly 50% of registered voters watched the 2026 World Cup, with viewership patterns primarily driven by income and education rather than political affiliation. The finding contradicts concerns that the tournament's political dimensions would divide audiences along partisan lines.
content: Nearly half of registered voters watched the 2026 World Cup, with income and education shaping viewership more than party affiliation, the survey found.

zh.title: CNBC调查发现世界杯观众尽管特朗普角色突出但仍保持两党态度
zh.summary: 一项CNBC调查发现，近50%的注册选民观看了2026年世界杯，观看模式主要由收入和教育水平驱动，而非政治派系。这项发现与关于赛事政治方面会沿党派划分观众的担忧相矛盾。

title: How a homegrown Chinese chip maker became the memory industry’s biggest wild card
summary: Chinese chip maker ChangXin Memory Technologies is preparing for a major public listing as it positions itself to challenge global memory chip leaders like Micron, SK Hynix, and Samsung. The company's emergence represents a significant disruption to the established memory semiconductor market.
content: As ChangXin Memory Technologies gears up for a breakout public listing, the chip maker is eyeing the turf held by Micron, SK Hynix and Samsung.

zh.title: 一家自主研发的中国芯片制造商如何成为存储产业最大的变数
zh.summary: 中国芯片制造商长鑫存储技术公司正准备进行大规模上市，同时定位自己与美光、SK海力士和三星等全球存储芯片领导者竞争。该公司的出现代表了对既有存储半导体市场的重大破坏。

title: Forget gasoline: Why the price surge in this under-the-radar fuel is the real threat to the U.S. economy
summary: While attention focuses on gasoline prices, rising diesel costs pose a greater economic threat to the United States. The surge in diesel prices could have broader economic consequences than fluctuations in gasoline.
content: As investors fret about gasoline, diesel prices have been rising and are threatening to cause even more economic destruction.

zh.title: 别管汽油了：为什么这种低调燃料的价格飙升才是美国经济的真正威胁
zh.summary: 虽然关注集中在汽油价格上，但柴油成本上升对美国经济构成更大的经济威胁。柴油价格的飙升可能会产生比汽油波动更广泛的经济后果。

title: This may be the real reason USDA made a huge revision to its beef-export sales data
summary: The USDA's significant revision to beef-export sales data reflects deteriorating conditions in the U.S. agricultural sector. Industry observers view the revision as another blow to struggling farmers and ranchers.
content: It’s ‘like driving one more nail into the proverbial coffin,’ says a rancher about the recent deterioration in U.S. agriculture data

zh.title: 这可能是美国农业部对牛肉出口销售数据进行重大修正的真实原因
zh.summary: 美国农业部对牛肉出口销售数据的重大修正反映了美国农业部门条件的恶化。行业观察人士将此修正视为对苦苦挣扎的农民和牧场主的又一打击。

title: Korean beauty products are becoming mainstream in the U.S. Why there may be even more growth ahead
summary: Korean beauty products are gaining mainstream acceptance in the U.S. market, with Morgan Stanley projecting K-beauty sales could reach approximately $4 billion in 2026. The trend indicates substantial growth potential for the sector.
content: Morgan Stanley forecasts that K-beauty sales in the U.S. can reach approximately $4 billion in 2026.

zh.title: 韩国美容产品正在美国成为主流，未来可能还有更大增长
zh.summary: 韩国美容产品在美国市场获得主流认可，摩根士丹利预测K美容销售额在2026年可能达到约40亿美元。这一趋势表明该行业具有巨大的增长潜力。

title: 'WarshGPT': How Wall Street is adapting to the Fed's new era of communication
summary: Investment firms are preparing for a shift in Federal Reserve communication with less public commentary and are increasingly using AI tools to maintain their competitive advantage. The trend reflects Wall Street's adaptation to the changing monetary policy landscape.
content: Investment firms are readying for an era with less public commentary from the U.S. central bank. Some are relying on AI for an edge.

zh.title: 'WarshGPT'：华尔街如何适应美联储的新沟通时代
zh.summary: 投资公司正在为美联储沟通方式的转变做准备，公开评论减少，并越来越多地使用人工智能工具来维持竞争优势。这一趋势反映了华尔街对不断变化的货币政策环境的适应。

title: How are prediction markets taxed? The IRS hasn’t provided guidance yet
summary: The IRS has not yet issued guidance on how prediction market winnings should be taxed or reported to federal authorities. The lack of clarity creates uncertainty for prediction market participants regarding their tax obligations.
content: Experts say the lack of federal guidance makes it's unclear on how prediction markets winnings should be reported and levied.

zh.title: 预测市场如何征税？美国国税局尚未提供指导
zh.summary: 美国国税局尚未发布关于预测市场收益如何征税或向联邦当局报告的指导。这种指导的缺失为预测市场参与者的税务义务造成了不确定性。

title: These are the most oversold stocks after a rough week on Wall Street
summary: After a difficult week for Wall Street with losses across major indexes, certain technology stocks including Oracle and IBM experienced particularly sharp declines. These oversold stocks may present opportunities for investors.
content: The major averages posted weekly losses, but a few tech stocks — such as Oracle and IBM — sold off especially hard.

zh.title: 华尔街经历艰难一周后，这些股票被过度抛售
zh.summary: 华尔街经历了艰难的一周，主要指数出现跌幅，包括甲骨文和IBM在内的某些科技股跌幅特别急剧。这些被过度抛售的股票可能为投资者带来机遇。

title: Will the Fed hike interest rates this month?
summary: Kevin Warsh's recent congressional testimony provided limited clarity on the Federal Reserve's interest rate outlook despite generating discussion. Uncertainty remains regarding whether the Fed will raise rates in the coming month.
content: Kevin Warsh’s testimony to Congress “offered some heat but not a lot of new light” on the outlook for interest rates, one economist said.

zh.title: 美联储本月会加息吗？
zh.summary: 凯文·沃什最近的国会证词尽管引发了讨论，但对联邦储备委员会的利率前景提供的澄清有限。关于美联储是否会在未来一个月内加息仍存在不确定性。

title: Ukrainian drone attacks kill seven warehouse workers in Russia, spark fire at Moscow region oil depot
summary: Ukrainian drone attacks resulted in seven deaths at Russian warehouses and ignited a fire at an oil facility in the Moscow region, according to Russian officials. Ukrainian leadership claims the strikes targeted military logistics facilities.
content: Russian governors say Ukrainian drones struck two online retail warehouses. Ukrainian President Zelenskyy says Kyiv hit military logistics facilities.

zh.title: 乌克兰无人机攻击在俄罗斯造成七名仓库工人死亡，莫斯科地区油库起火
zh.summary: 根据俄罗斯官员的说法，乌克兰无人机攻击导致俄罗斯仓库七人死亡，并在莫斯科地区的油气设施引发火灾。乌克兰领导层声称这些打击针对的是军事物流设施。

title: U.S. military says it has completed the latest round of strikes against Iran, amid more disruptions to shipping
summary: The U.S. military has concluded another round of strikes against Iran while maintaining a naval blockade against the country. Kuwait and Bahrain report intercepting additional Iranian projectiles as maritime disruptions continue.
content: U.S. Central Command says it continues to enforce a naval blockade against Iran, while Kuwait and Bahrain say they have intercepted more Iranian projectiles.

zh.title: 美军表示已完成最新一轮对伊朗的打击，海运中断加剧
zh.summary: 美军完成了对伊朗的新一轮打击，同时对该国实施海军封锁。科威特和巴林报告截获了更多伊朗导弹，海运中断仍在继续。

title: Guidance needed for families reclaiming childcare
summary: A pilot scheme allowing families to reclaim childcare costs is facing implementation challenges, with some households encountering difficulties submitting and processing claims. The issues underscore the need for clearer guidance to help families access the financial support intended for them.
content: Some families have had problems claiming back cash as part of the pilot scheme.

zh.title: 家庭回收托儿费用需要指导
zh.summary: 一项允许家庭回收托儿费用的试点计划面临实施挑战，一些家庭在提交和处理索赔时遇到困难。这些问题突出表明需要更清晰的指导来帮助家庭获得为他们提供的财政支持。

title: Rural residents back heating oil protection plan
summary: Rural residents who rely on heating oil for home heating are backing a new protection plan for the fuel, calling for improved regulation of pricing. The support reflects concerns over affordability and price volatility among communities with limited energy alternatives.
content: Households reliant on heating oil as a fuel source say better regulation of pricing is needed.

zh.title: 农村居民支持取暖油保护计划
zh.summary: 依靠取暖油进行家庭供暖的农村居民正在支持一项新的燃料保护计划，呼吁改进价格监管。这种支持反映了在能源选择有限的社区中对可负担性和价格波动的担忧。

title: 'I'd rather not leave the house so I don't get into more debt'
summary: Great Yarmouth residents are facing some of the highest problem debt levels in the UK, with some avoiding leaving their homes to prevent further financial difficulties. Local support services are being deployed to help residents tackle their financial challenges.
content: Great Yarmouth has some of the highest levels of problem debt in the country, but help is at hand.

zh.title: 我宁愿不离开家，这样我就不会陷入更多债务
zh.summary: 大雅茅斯的居民面临着英国一些最高的问题债务水平，一些人避免离开家以防止进一步的财务困难。当地支持服务正在部署中，以帮助居民解决其财务挑战。

title: Fat cat? Weight-loss drugs may be coming for your overweight pet
summary: Startups are developing GLP-1 weight-loss treatments for overweight pets, while major pet-food companies are investing in longevity products. The trend reflects increasing consumer spending on pet health and wellness.
content: Startups are testing GLP-1 treatments for overweight cats while pet-food giants are leaning into longevity products as owners spend more on animal health.

zh.title: 胖猫？减肥药可能即将用于你的超重宠物
zh.summary: 初创公司正在为超重宠物开发GLP-1减肥治疗，而主要宠物食品公司正在投资长寿产品。这一趋势反映了消费者在宠物健康和保健上的支出不断增加。

title: Meet Kimi K3, the newest Chinese AI model haunting Silicon Valley
summary: Moonshot AI released Kimi K3, an open Chinese AI model rapidly closing the performance gap with leading U.S. labs, intensifying competition in the global AI race. The development signals China's AI advancement and challenges Western technological dominance.
content: Moonshot AI’s new open model is catching up to Anthropic and OpenAI, raising questions about the future of the AI race.

zh.title: 认识Kimi K3，最新的中国AI模型令硅谷担忧
zh.summary: 月之暗面发布了Kimi K3，一个开源的中国AI模型，正在迅速缩小与美国领先实验室的性能差距，加剧了全球AI竞赛的竞争。这一发展表明了中国AI的进步，并挑战了西方的技术主导地位。

title: 'My buyers dropped their offer by £15,000 the day before exchange': Gazundering and how to avoid it
summary: Gazundering—when property buyers reduce their offer just before closing—is an emerging concern in the real estate market. The article provides guidance for sellers on how to protect themselves from this practice.
content: It's a small but growing problem in the property market - here's how to protect yourself.

zh.title: "我的买家在交割前一天降价15,000英镑"：反套利及如何避免
zh.summary: 反套利（房产买家在交割前降价）是房地产市场中出现的新问题。该文章为卖家提供了如何保护自己免受这种做法的指导。

title: Chinese AI has leveled up, and brought renewed focus on the open weight model shift
summary: China's latest AI model demonstrates significant progress in closing the performance gap with U.S. leaders, accelerating the industry's shift toward open-weight models. This development highlights changing competitive dynamics in AI development.
content: It's the latest AI model from China to close the performance gap with leading U.S. AI labs.

zh.title: 中国AI已升级，并重新关注开源权重模型的转变
zh.summary: 中国最新的AI模型在缩小与美国领导者之间的性能差距方面取得了显著进展，加速了行业向开源权重模型的转变。这一发展突出了AI开发中竞争动态的变化。
